items.headline: Redistributing Elon Musk’s $1 Trillion Fortune Would Likely Give Each U.S. Household Just $1,500. Here’s the Math
items.summary: On a recent episode of the Peter Schiff Show, economist Peter Schiff took aim at a wealth redistribution proposal floated by Sen. Adam Schiff, using Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk as his case study. Adam Schiff pointed to calculations suggesting that $1 trillion could provide roughly $7,500 to every U.S. household or eliminate student debt ... Redistributing Elon Musk’s $1 Trillion Fortune Would Likely Give Each U.S. Household Just $1,500. Here’s the Math

items.headline: Intel (INTC) Lands Google And Tesla Deals As U.S. Takes Equity Stake
items.summary: The U.S. government converts a portion of CHIPS Act support into an equity stake in Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC), creating a new public shareholder with policy interests tied to domestic chip production. Intel announces new AI partnerships with Google for long term AI workloads and with Tesla’s TeraFab focused on semiconductor foundry improvements. The company also unveils an AI drug discovery collaboration with Greenstone Biosciences, extending its chips and software into pharmaceutical...

items.headline: Heavy SpaceX Options Trading Driven by New Weekly Contracts
items.summary: Trading in  SpaceX  options remained heavy Thursday, their third day since the options launch.  As of 1 p.m. ET, 1.26 million SpaceX options had traded, about equally divided between calls and puts.  SpaceX ranked third among all stocks for options trading, behind only  Nvidia  and  Tesla  according to data from Susquehanna Investment Group.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: India's Tata Electronics hit by cyber breach claiming to expose Apple, Tesla trade secrets
items.summary: Tata Electronics said on Monday it had detected a recent "cybersecurity incident", after researchers said World Leaks posted purported component design and specification papers of Apple and Tesla, both customers of the Indian group.  Apple was investigating the breach ​and a "full analysis was going on", a source familiar with the matter said, adding that Tata had received a ransom demand related to the incident.  Apple did not respond to requests for comment.
items.why_it_matters: News impact is unclear; monitor price and volume reaction.

items.headline: Anthropic Technical Expert: ‘Coding Is No Longer the Bottleneck’ as Engineers Ship 8x More Code Per Quarter
items.summary: A recent appearance by Fiona Fung, who manages the Claude Code and Cowork teams at Anthropic, on Lenny Rachitsky’s Podcast offered a window into how one of the world’s most prominent AI labs approaches software engineering when its engineers are AI-native. Her headline claim is that today, “Coding is no longer the bottleneck.” Fung referenced ... Anthropic Technical Expert: ‘Coding Is No Longer the Bottleneck’ as Engineers Ship 8x More Code Per Quarter
